# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: low-latency-service
        image: low-latency-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-network-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-network-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-network-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-network-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: direct-network-service
        image: direct-network-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: ENABLE_DIRECT_ACCESS
          value: "true"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: direct-network-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: direct-network-service
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-performance-db-client
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: high-performance-db-client
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-performance-db-client
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-performance-db-client
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: db-client
        image: high-performance-db-client:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-performance-db-client
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-performance-db-client
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: legacy-tcp-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: legacy-tcp-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: legacy-tcp-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: legacy-tcp-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: legacy-service
        image: legacy-tcp-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: legacy-tcp-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: legacy-tcp-service
  ports:
  - port: 3000
    targetPort: 3000
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-streaming-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: udp-streaming-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-streaming-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-streaming-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: streaming-service
        image: udp-streaming-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          protocol: UDP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-streaming-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: udp-streaming-service
  ports:
  - port: 8000
    targetPort: 8000
    protocol: UDP
  type: ClusterIP
